title: rubus pilisiensis
intro: Rubus pilisiensis, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Tibetan Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus pilisiensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken to alleviate various health issues, including digestive problems and fever.
